text:
ByOscar Hartzog

If you purchase an independently reviewed product or service through a link on our website, Rolling Stone may receive an affiliate commission.

The USA men’ssoccerteam is on to their second opponent in the2024 Paris Olympics, facing off against New Zealand on Saturday. The Group A matchup comes after Team USA lost to France in their tournament opener. New Zealand won its first match, besting Guinea 2-1.

Marko Mitrović’s US side now sits in last place in Group A, while New Zealand is at No. 2 between France (in first) and Guinea. Team USA is looking to secure their first Olympic knockout stage spot since 2000. New Zealand had a great run in the 2020Olympics, staying alive until a quarterfinal loss to Japan.

Saturday’s game is a must-win for Team USA to keep their Olympics hopes alive. If you’re looking to watch the game live, read on. Below is a quick guide on where towatchUSA vs. New Zealand, including a way to watch USA vs. New Zealand for free.

The best way to watch USA vs. New Zealand is to get a free trial to alive TV servicethat carries USA Network.DirecTV Streamis one of our favorites, offering a five-day free trial before billing starts at $79.99 a month (if you choose to continue).fuboalso carries USA and offers a free trial (seven days). Another option isHulu + Live TV, which starts with a three-day free trial and costs $76.99 a month after that.

A more affordable option to watch the USA vs. New Zealandsoccergame isPeacock, although you’ll have to pay right away (no free trial). Peacock costs just $7.99 a month or $79.99 a year (the annual plan saves you about 17% over the year) and offers livestreams of every Olympics event.

If you want to watch USA vs. New Zealand for free, you can do so with a free trial from one of the cable streaming services mentioned above (DirecTV Stream,fubo, orHulu + Live TV). You will need to enter payment information when you sign up, but you won’t be charged anything as long as you cancel before the trial ends.Trending StoriesJohn Lithgow Knows J.K. Rowling's Anti-Trans Views Will Now Forever Come Up in 'Every Interview'Kevin Spacey’s 'Mental Illness' Should Trigger $29.5 Million Payout, 'House of Cards' Trial Jurors HearBTS Nails Its Comeback With 'Arirang'Top Disaster Response Official Claims He Teleported to a Waffle House

Team USA and New Zealand face off on Saturday, July 27. Kickoff is at 1 p.m. ET/10 a.m. PT.

Although they fell apart in the second half against France, Team USA looked strong for the first 45. They’ll be the favorite against New Zealand on Saturday with a moneyline of -160 against the Kiwis’ +430.

We want to hear it. Send us a tip using our anonymous form.

title: How to Watch USA vs. New Zealand Olympics Soccer Game Online Free
author: Oscar Hartzog
description: Here’s how to watch USA vs. New Zealand online during the 2024 Olympics, including how to get a free USA vs. New Zealand live stream without cable.
